mapper.update:
update lkt_bbs_label set recycle = 1 where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lkt_bbs_label_post lp WHERE lp.label_id = l.id ) AS post_num, l.name, DATE_FORMAT( l.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s' ) AS create_time, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(lp.post_id) FROM lkt_bbs_label_post lp WHERE lp.label_id = l.id) AS post_ids FROM lkt_bbs_label l
limit #{pageNo},#{pageSize}
select l.name from lkt_bbs_label l left join lkt_bbs_label_post lp on lp.label_id = l.id left join lkt_bbs_post p on lp.post_id = p.id where lp.post_id = #{post_id} and l.recycle = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM lkt_bbs_label WHERE name = #{name} and recycle = 0
and id <>#{id}
